# PBB Realtime Browser SDK

This is Hotline's vendored browser SDK copy for PBB Realtime.

Hotline frontend code must import this local copy instead of importing from a sibling `realtime` repository checkout. Release builds and installed nodes may run on machines where the Realtime source tree is not present.

Source of truth for SDK behavior remains the PBB Realtime project. Refresh this folder from `realtime/resources/js/sdk` when Hotline needs a newer browser SDK contract.
